Require D108 versioned KV support and produce a clear adapter error when absent.

import { requireKvVersioned } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

	tier: KvStorageTier<T>,
	label = "kvStorage",
): VersionedKvStorageTier<T>
```
